prompts.name: 激烈的电影级僵尸末日幸存者场景
prompts.content:
我的照片，一个20岁的美国男性，穿着探险装备，在一场枪战后靠在一辆受损轿车的后部。他用右手握着手枪，躺在布满玻璃碎片和灰尘的沥青路面上。
他的脸看起来疲惫而紧张，脸上和腿上沾满灰尘并带有伤痕。周围是准备攻击的僵尸。自然日光，紧张而逼真的氛围，如同现代动作电影场景，锐利的焦点，带有电影感的蓝灰色调。
prompts.author: Yaseen Khan Gul
prompts.nameEn: Intense Cinematic Zombie Apocalypse Survivor Scene
prompts.contentEn:
My photo as a 20 year-old American man, dressed for adventure, leaning against the back of a damaged sedan after a shootout. He held the pistol with his right hand while lying on the asphalt covered in glass shards and dust.
His face looked tired and tense, slightly dirty with wounds on his face and legs. It was surrounded by zombies ready to attack. Natural daylight, an intense and realistic atmosphere like a modern action film scene, sharp focus with a cinematic bluish-gray color tone.
